name: content-flywheel
description: End-to-end content production pipeline. Raw notes in, publish-ready posts out. Automates intake, drafting, AI-pattern auditing, hook generation, and posting queue management.

interface.shortDescription: Raw notes in, publish-ready posts out. A complete content production system.
interface.longDescription: Six skills that form a complete content production pipeline: (1) Content Intake scans your notes and transcripts for post-worthy ideas. (2) Content Writer drafts in your authentic voice using a voice guide. (3) AI Writing Audit catches 16+ categories of AI patterns. (4) LinkedIn Hook Writer generates 10 pattern-breaking hooks. (5) Content Flywheel orchestrates the full pipeline end-to-end. (6) Garrison Queue manages your posting queue from draft to posted to archived. Built from a production system that runs daily.
defaultPrompt: Run the content flywheel to process my notes into publish-ready posts.
Feed the hopper with today's content.
